---
title: "test_metrics_engine.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\unit\test_metrics_engine.py"
loc: 26
complexity: 2
logic_score: 5.50
style_score: 4.08
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.98
---

## Intent
The `test_metrics_engine.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestMetricsEngine, test_linter_parse, test_metrics_compute, test_sprt_delta. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestMetricsEngine, test_linter_parse, test_metrics_compute, test_sprt_delta. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [src.core.metrics](file://src.core.metrics)
- [src.core.prompt_linter](file://src.core.prompt_linter)
- [tests.integration.project_fishtest](file://tests.integration.project_fishtest)

### Exports
- `TestMetricsEngine`
- `test_linter_parse`
- `test_metrics_compute`
- `test_sprt_delta`
